name: ADLINK Technology, Inc.
summary: ADLINK Technology, Inc. manufactures and sells hardware, software, and peripheral devices for industrial computers in Asia Pacific, Mainland China, America, and Europe. The company offers processor blades, switch blades, and platforms; AI training platforms; CompactPCI blades, switches, backplanes, enclosures and systems, peripherals and accessories, rear transition modules, power supplies, and intelligent railway platforms; computer-on-modules; multi-function DAQ, USB DAQ, digital I/O, digitizer, dynamic signal analyzer, GPIB, timer/counter, and test and measurement software and utility products; deep learning accelerators, edge AI platforms and servers, and AI machine vision devices; and embedded flash storage solutions. It also provides embedded graphics, EtherCAT solutions, extreme outdoor servers, industrial fieldbuses, industrial motherboards and SBCs, industrial PCs, fanless embedded PCs, and infotainment internet of things (IoT) devices; and medical panel computers and tablets, network security appliances, panel PCs and monitors, single board computers, and PXI/PXIe platforms, as well as motion control and machine vision products. In addition, the company offers railway systems, ROS2 solutions, rugged VITA 75 COTS computers, and video processing servers, as well as VPX and smart manufacturing solutions. Further, it provides graphics processing unit, IoT, and artificial intelligence and robotics solutions. The company serves intelligent systems, defense and aviation, industrial automation, infotainment, power/energy, healthcare, test and measurement, transportation, telecommunication, network security, smart manufacturing, retail, cities and environmental, and buildings industries. ADLINK Technology, Inc. was incorporated in 1995 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
